title: Tick Control in Kensington, Brooklyn | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Effective treatments from $125 – $325. Call today!
intro: Kensington's tree-lined streets and proximity to Prospect Park create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Kensington families and pets from deer ticks, dog ticks, and the serious diseases they carry. We provide targeted treatments for yards, gardens, and outdoor spaces throughout this charming Brooklyn neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in tick management for Kensington's unique urban-suburban environment, with extensive experience treating properties near green spaces and parks. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages.
localContext: Kensington residents enjoying the nearby Prospect Park or relaxing in their private gardens need reliable tick protection, especially during peak season from April through October. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes with yards, the greenery along Ocean Parkway, and proximity to Caton Park all contribute to increased tick activity in the area.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Kensington range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and treatment scope. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season. We'll provide a free assessment and customized quote for your specific property.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Kensington, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Kensington from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be present whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend beginning preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for comprehensive coverage.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my pets and children in my Kensington yard?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. After treatment, we recommend keeping children and pets inside for 2-3 hours until the product has dried. Once dry, treated areas are safe for normal use while remaining effective against ticks.

faqs.question: Do you treat for ticks near Prospect Park and green spaces?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in treating Kensington properties adjacent to Prospect Park and other green spaces where tick populations are highest. Our perimeter treatments create a protective barrier around your yard, and we focus on high-risk areas like property edges, tall grass, shrubs, and wooded borders where ticks commonly wait for hosts.
